dlc: DayZ Livonia (incorporado na versao base em 1.25 de maio 2024)
source: Heightmap sintetico baseado em parametros reais do terrain
note: Para dados 100% precisos, extraia worlds_enoch.pbo via DayZ Tools e exporte ASC pelo Terrain Builder

geography_notes.center_zone: Rio Biela (leste-oeste), lagos Jantar/Sitnickie, Lukow Airfield — ~130-230m
geography_notes.south_zone: Floresta densa, bases militares, Nadbor, Sila factory — ~200-300m
geography_notes.peaks: Dambog SW (bunker subterraneo), Sowa SE, Rodzanica, Kopa, Swarog, Krsnik — ~230-385m
geography_notes.player_spawns: Borda sul, Z aprox 100-400, X de 2500 a 12500

extraction_guide.step1: DayZ Tools Launcher > Tools > Extract Game Data
extraction_guide.step4: ASC header esperado: ncols 4096, nrows 4096, cellsize 3.125, xllcorner 200000
